Description: Draft feature for centralizing the configurable definition of what makes a selected photo best.

Stories.StoryDescription: Create a configurable schema for weighting people, scenery, diversity, and other selection factors.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has a single modifiable definition of best-photo scoring.

Stories.StoryDescription: Convert cluster and metadata outputs into comparable scores for ranking.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Accepted photos can receive comparable scores for selection.
